creator: ykasap@gmail.com
text:
editor/emacs-devel enables the "PGTK" option by default, but running the package with the X server emits a warning window saying:

You are trying to run Emacs configured with the "pure-GTK" interface under the X Window System.  That configuration is unsupported and will lead to sporadic crashes during transfer of large selection data.  It will also lead to various problems with keyboard input.

I believe most FreeBSD users still use X servers for their desktops, so could you please consider disabling the "PGTK" option by default? Or is this package for more adventurous people running Wayland?
